closed_form: rho_m(a) = Om * a^-(3+alpha_Q); rho_L(a) = OL0 + (alpha_Q*Om/(3+alpha_Q))*(1 - a^-(3+alpha_Q))
k10_sign_consistency_note: At the degenerate minimum alpha_Q=0 both full and L3 toy give w_a=0. Forcing alpha_Q=0.05 yields w_a<0 in both -> sign-consistent. K10 is formally cleared but K1/K2 fail.
rationale: Reformulated J^0=alpha_Q*H*rho_m ansatz yields closed-form background that recovers LCDM exactly at alpha_Q=0. Joint fit drives alpha_Q -> 0 because any alpha_Q>0 pushes rho_m(z) as a^-(3+alpha_Q), shifting the matter-radiation equality and sound horizon, which compressed CMB rejects at >5 sigma already for alpha_Q=0.02 (chi2_CMB: 2.3 -> 38). K10 (toy vs full sign) is cleared structurally, but K1 (delta_chi2 ~ 0) and K2 (|w_a|=0) both fail. Perez-Sudarsky diffusion at background level with a matter-proportional current is CMB-dead.
